title: uragoga anamallayana
intro: Uragoga anamallayana, also known as the Anamallays root, is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Uragoga anamallayana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. In herbal preparations, Uragoga anamallayana is typically used in the form of a decoction or paste, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
